highItems.text: Restart JARVIS + widen channel filter. Socket Mode is zombie-connected (logs/jarvis-stde…
highItems.full: Restart JARVIS + widen channel filter. Socket Mode is zombie-connected (logs/jarvis-stderr.log full of ping/pong timeouts), two competing PIDs since Monday 5PM, and scripts/jarvis.js:219 pins to SLACK_CHANNEL_ID only (#sasmaster-builds). Effect: `!approve mo9mqkhy`, `!linkedin <theme>`, etc. posted in #sasmaster-content or #sasmaster-intel are silently dropped. Fix: `pkill -f 'scripts/jarvis.js'`, check launchd plist for duplicate definitions, then edit the filter to accept an allowlist of [SLACK_CHANNEL_ID, SLACK_CONTENT_CHANNEL_ID, SLACK_INTEL_CHANNEL_ID]. Smoke test `!status` in each channel. See memory project_jarvis_restart_pending.md for full plan.
highItems.sprint: Sprint 4 — War Room & Agent Fleet hygiene (added 2026-04-22 01:52)

highItems.text: EIDR backfill Phase 1b — populate parent_keys.eidr_id column. agents/eidr-agent.js + cre…
highItems.full: EIDR backfill Phase 1b — populate parent_keys.eidr_id column. agents/eidr-agent.js + creds already exist. Bulk loop over 589,814 matched IMDB tconsts resolving to EIDR IDs. Rate-limit (EIDR API throttles; target ≤5 rps). Output: new `parent_keys/v1b/YYYY-MM-DD/movies.parquet` with eidr_id column populated where match found. Match-rate baseline TBD (likely 60–85% for studio-released films). Skip TMDB fallback keys (tmdb_mov_*) as EIDR has no TMDB join surface.
highItems.sprint: Sprint 5 — S3 Data Lake & Phase 1b completion (added 2026-04-22 05:00)

highItems.text: TMDB TV Episodes flatten — job `tmdb-tv-episodes` · 0 TMDB calls · ~3 min. BLOCKED until…
highItems.full: TMDB TV Episodes flatten — job `tmdb-tv-episodes` · 0 TMDB calls · ~3 min. BLOCKED until TV Seasons done. DuckDB UNNEST seasons.episodes (~2M TMDB episodes across 300K series) + LEFT JOIN imdb/title_episode parquet (9.6M superset) to populate imdb_id. Saves ~2M would-be API calls.
highItems.sprint: Sprint 6 — TMDB full-ingest continuation chain (on deck, 2026-04-22 06:15)

highItems.full: TMDB Movie Enrichment backfill — job `tmdb-movie-backfill` · ~1.18M calls · ~10h. BLOCKED until main loader fully idle (people phase complete) to avoid rate-limit contention. Sidecar-only: writes watch/providers+videos+reviews+images for the 1.18M pre-v2 movies to `tmdb_dev/movies_enrichment/YYYY-MM-DD/`. Never touches existing `tmdb_dev/movies/`.
